title: Cobblemon Raid Den Queue
description: Adds a command that makes so players can queue into a raid together without having to search for it in the survival world. /rqueue
body:
A quality-of-life addon for Cobblemon that adds a streamlined queue system for Raid Dens. Players can use /rqueue to access an intuitive GUI where they can select raid difficulty tiers (1-5 stars), see who else is queuing, and start raids together.

**Features:**

1. Simple /rqueue command opens a difficulty selection menu
2. Visual queue display showing ready players
3. Automatic raid crystal spawning and configuration
4. Player teleportation to raid dimension and back to original location
5. Support for solo or group raids (up to 4 players)

**Requirements:**

1. Cobblemon 1.7.0+
2. Cobblemon Raid Dens 0.6.4+
3. Fabric API
4. Fabric Loader 0.17.3+
